Ntc Of Mtn For Protective Order; Req For Judicial Ntc And Statement Of Disputed Answers
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Bally Total Fitness Holding Corporation's Motion For Protective Order is granted in part and denied in part. The Protective Order is granted as to both sets of Form Interrogatories as Plaintiff does not contend that responses are required at this time.
The Protective Order is denied as to Request For Production, Set One, Nos. 2-8, 13, 14, and 16 limited to documents used in the year Plaintiff was hired.
The Protective Order is granted as to Request For Production, Set One, Nos. 1, 9-12, 15, and 17-32.
The Protective Order is denied as to Request For Identification And Production Of Documents Nos. 2-8, 13, 14, and 16, limited to documents used in the year Plaintiff was hired1.
The Protective Order is granted as to Request For Identification And Production Of Documents Nos. 1, 9-12, and 15.
Further responses and production shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order.

All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents At Deposition Of Defts' Person Most Qualified Regarding Its Alleged Arbitration Agreement: Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,975.
Off Calendar Apr-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Michael La Sala's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents At Deposition Of Defendants' Person Most Knowledgeable Regarding Its Alleged Arbitration Agreement is granted as the Notice of Deposition did not comply with C.C.P. Section 2025.250(b). Counsel are advised that the documents requests are overly broad and must be limited to this plaintiff, the documents provided to him, and the process undertaken in obtaining his signature. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
